footer.blurb: Ministry-approved driver education for students across {{area}}. Your safety and success on the road come first. Lessons explained in {{languages}}.
footer.mto: Licensed by Province of Ontario, Ministry of Transportation (MTO). Your safety is our priority.

metaDesc.home: MTO-approved BDE and driving lessons across the GTA, Mississauga, Windsor, and Ontario. Multilingual support. One Danforth office. Register and pay online.
metaDesc.about: About Shaaz Driving Academy — MTO-approved driver education, experienced instructors, and 20+ years serving Ontario students from our Scarborough Danforth office.
metaDesc.courses: Driving courses and pricing: BDE packages, G1, G2, and G prep — classroom, digital, and in-car training across the GTA and Ontario.
metaDesc.locations: Our Danforth Ave office in Scarborough and GTA & Ontario service areas — Mississauga, Windsor, Brampton, and more.
metaDesc.faq: FAQ on road tests, G1 and G2, BDE certification, payments, schedules, and DriveTest prep — Shaaz Driving Academy Ontario.
metaDesc.contact: Contact Shaaz Driving Academy by phone or email for lessons and registration. Serving the GTA, Mississauga, Windsor, and Ontario.
metaDesc.register: Register online for BDE or individual driving lessons. Quick form — we'll confirm your course and next steps.
metaDesc.pay: Pay a course deposit or fee online for Shaaz Driving Academy. Secure checkout. Need help? Call or email us.
metaDesc.paySuccess: Your payment was received. Thank you for choosing Shaaz Driving Academy.

notify.ownerEmailNotConfigured: Staff email alerts are not configured on the server. Your submission is still saved.
notify.ownerEmailFailed: Your registration is saved. Our automatic staff email didn't send (technical issue on our side). Please call or email us if you need help right away—we still have your details.
notify.ownerEmailMixed: Staff email: {{sent}} of {{total}} notification(s) sent. Some inboxes may not have received it.
notify.smsNotSent: SMS alert to instructor: not sent (check Twilio settings on the server).
notify.registrantSent: We sent a confirmation email to your address — please check your inbox (and spam/junk).
notify.registrantFailed: We couldn't send a confirmation email right now; your registration is still saved and we'll contact you.

pay.loadError: We couldn’t load payment options right now — this section is still being set up. Please call or email us to pay a deposit or fee.

paySuccessPage.helpPrefix: If you have questions about your course or next steps, call

hero.eyebrow: Ministry-approved · Serving the GTA for 20+ years
hero.title: Drive with confidence — from your first lesson to test day
hero.lead: MTO-approved BDE and flexible in-car lessons from friendly, experienced instructors — step-by-step, hands-on coaching. Register or pay online anytime. In {{languages}} when it helps you learn.
hero.seo1Body: classroom, in-car, and digital components across the GTA and Ontario.
hero.seo2Body: packages and individual lessons; road-test prep with help choosing a DriveTest centre and practice plan.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.intro: A simple path from first contact to getting your licence.
howItWorks.step1Text: Browse BDE packages or individual lessons, or tell us your goals — we will match you to the right program.
howItWorks.step2Text: Submit your details and pay deposits securely by card. Prefer phone or email? We are one tap away.
howItWorks.step3Text: Friendly, experienced instructors teach you step by step with hands-on coaching in the car. When you are ready, we help you pick a DriveTest location and practice plan that fit you — then book your test with confidence.

homeQuickLinks.title: Explore
homeQuickLinks.intro: Browse courses, locations, and answers to common questions — everything you need to get started.

homeAreas.title: Driving lessons & BDE across the GTA and Ontario
homeAreas.intro: {{brand}} serves students from Toronto, Scarborough, North York, East York, Etobicoke, Ajax, Brampton, Pickering, Oakville, Oshawa, Whitby, Unionville, Mississauga, Windsor, and communities across the GTA. We offer MTO-approved BDE packages, individual lessons for G1→G2 and G2→G, and support for road test preparation.

contact.offerLanguages: We offer instruction and support in

faqChat.title: Ask us anything
faqChat.subtitle: Type a question below. Replies use our FAQ when there's a close match — for anything else, reach us by phone or email.
faqChat.welcome: Hi! Ask about road tests, G1, payments, certificates, or lessons. Try the quick prompts below, or type your own question.
faqChat.fallback: I don't have a specific answer for that in our FAQ yet. {{name}} can help directly:
faqChat.placeholder: Type your question and press Send…
quickPrompts: How do I book my road test?
Can I do a course without G1?
I have a driver's licence from another country. How do I apply in Ontario and what tests do I need?
